title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Prestige Estates

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Prestige Estates
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates:
Prestige Estates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates!
